recommendations.title: Glitter
recommendations.overview: A young woman is catapulted into pop stardom, with her already-famous DJ boyfriend calling the shots.

recommendations.title: Gridlock'd
recommendations.overview: After a friend overdoses, Spoon and Stretch decide to kick their drug habits and attempt to enroll in a government detox program. Their efforts are hampered by seemingly endless red tape, as they are shuffled from one office to another while being ch

recommendations.title: The Gold Rush
recommendations.overview: A gold prospector in Alaska struggles to survive the elements and win the heart of a dance hall girl.

recommendations.title: Annie Hall
recommendations.overview: New York comedian Alvy Singer falls in love with the ditsy Annie Hall.

recommendations.title: Black Rain
recommendations.overview: Two New York cops get involved in a gang war between members of the Yakuza, the Japanese Mafia. They arrest one of their killers and are ordered to escort him back to Japan. However, in Japan he manages to escape, and as they try to track him down, t

recommendations.title: Captain Phillips
recommendations.overview: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

recommendations.title: The Night House
recommendations.overview: Reeling from the unexpected death of her husband, Beth is left alone in the lakeside home he built for her. Soon she begins to uncover her recently deceased husband's disturbing secrets.

recommendations.title: Crooklyn
recommendations.overview: From Spike Lee comes this vibrant semi-autobiographical portrait of a school-teacher, her stubborn jazz-musician husband and their five kids living in '70s Brooklyn.

recommendations.title: Cymbeline
recommendations.overview: War erupts between dirty cops and outlaw bikers as a drug kingpin tries to protect his empire.

recommendations.title: Broken Arrow
recommendations.overview: When rogue stealth-fighter pilot Vic Deakins deliberately drops off the radar while on maneuvers, the Air Force ends up with two stolen nuclear warheads -- and Deakins's co-pilot, Riley Hale, is the military's only hope for getting them back. Travers
